target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Building appears structurally intact; roof, walls, and windows show no visible signs of damage or deformation; no debris or structural failure evident.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Building appears structurally intact; all windows are present and undamaged; roof is complete with no visible holes or missing sections; facade shows no signs of collapse or significant deformation.

summary: Two buildings assessed show NO DAMAGE with CONFIRMED confidence; both appear structurally intact with undamaged windows, complete roofs, and no visible debris or collapse. The overall scene depicts a well-maintained urban area with a large institutional building and surrounding residential structures, all appearing undamaged and functional. Given the prior assessments, the scene indicates no functional disruption to the assessed buildings.
